Archive Categories

Browse by category

Each active category contains multiple records, giving every shelf enough material to test structure, navigation, and reader flow.

Modern Strange Records

Modern, near-modern, reported, and internet-era records

Modern Strange Records

Urban Legends

Urban legends, cautionary tales, roadside rumors, and modern folklore explained through origin, meaning, versions, and why they still feel possible.

The Microwaved Pet Urban Legend: Household Technology, Legal Rumor, and Impossible CarelessnessBlue Star Acid Urban Legend: Temporary Tattoos, School Warnings, and Drug Panic FolklorePoisoned Halloween Candy Legend: Trick-or-Treat Fear, Rumor, and the Dangerous Treat
View Urban Legends

Modern Strange Records

Internet Folklore

Internet folklore, digital legends, online myths, cursed images, screenshots, games, and forum-born stories traced through meaning, spread, and source limits.

Russian Sleep Experiment Creepypasta: Fake Document, Laboratory Horror, and Viral BeliefSmile Dog Creepypasta: Haunted Image, Email Chain, and the Face People SharedBen Drowned Creepypasta: Haunted Game File, Forum Updates, and a Digital Ghost Story
View Internet Folklore

Modern Strange Records

Strange Places

Strange places, legendary locations, impossible maps, vanished roads, and place-based mysteries explored as folklore rather than confirmed fact.

Stull Cemetery Legend: Gateway Rumors, College Folklore, and a Haunted Kansas GraveyardParis Catacombs Legends: Bones, Tunnels, and the City Beneath the CityDoor to Hell: Darvaza Gas Crater, Burning Desert, and the Place That Became a Legend
View Strange Places

Modern Strange Records

Unexplained Mysteries

Unexplained mysteries, strange records, unresolved questions, and evidence-limit stories examined without turning uncertainty into sensational certainty.

Devil’s Sea Mystery: Dragon’s Triangle, Maritime Rumor, and the Dangerous Waters of LegendGreenbrier Ghost Case: Courtroom Memory, Apparition Claim, and a Mystery Between Law and FolkloreHessdalen Lights: Valley Sightings, Scientific Study, and the Glow That Would Not Settle
View Unexplained Mysteries

Modern Strange Records

Classic Folklore

Classic folklore, oral tradition, inherited warnings, folk beliefs, and recurring motifs read through origin, meaning, versions, and cultural memory.

Dullahan Folklore: Headless Rider, Night Road, and the Name Called From the DarkBrownie Folklore: House Spirit, Night Work, and the Gift That Must Not Be NamedKitsune Folklore: Fox Spirits, Shape-Shifting, and the Line Between Trick and Blessing
View Classic Folklore

Modern Strange Records

Modern Legends

Modern legends, reported sightings, rumor cycles, cryptid-like accounts, and near-contemporary folklore shaped by repetition and social memory.

Fresno Nightcrawler Legend: Walking White Figures, Video Evidence, and a Cryptid Built by FootageBunny Man Legend: Fairfax County Rumor, Bridge Folklore, and the Costumed FigureBlack-Eyed Children Legend: Doorway Encounters, Requests to Enter, and Modern Fear
View Modern Legends

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Mythic, legendary, symbolic, and imagined-world records

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Myths

Myths, creation stories, sacred narratives, heroes, gods, and symbolic folklore explained through meaning, versions, and lasting cultural patterns.

Demeter and Persephone: Abduction, Seasons, and the Myth of Return With a ConditionMaui Slows the Sun: Rope, Dawn, and the Myth That Made the Day LongerOsiris and Isis: Dismemberment, Search, and the Egyptian Myth of Restoration
View Myths

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Mythic Creatures

Mythic creatures, dragons, krakens, giants, spirits, sea beings, and forest figures explored through folklore meaning, origin, and regional versions.

Naga Folklore: Serpent Beings, Water, Guardianship, and Sacred ThresholdsQilin: Auspicious Creature, Gentle Power, and the Mythic Sign of a Just AgeKelpie Folklore: Water Horse, River Warning, and the Creature That Carries Riders Away
View Mythic Creatures

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Lost Worlds

Lost worlds, vanished islands, hidden cities, impossible geography, and unmapped places explained as legends, myths, and archive patterns.

Kitezh: Hidden City, Lake Svetloyar, and the Legend That Vanished From InvadersCity of Ys: Sunken Breton City, Flooded Gates, and the Kingdom Beneath the SeaEl Dorado: Golden Ruler, Lost City Search, and the World Made From a Rumor of Gold
View Lost Worlds

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Strange Nature

Strange nature folklore, unusual forests, sky omens, sea phenomena, impossible plants, and landscape mysteries read with careful source limits.

Fairy Rings: Mushroom Circles, Grass Patterns, and the Folklore of a Natural ShapeNaga Fireballs: Mekong Lights, Festival Reports, and the River Phenomenon Between Belief and DebateSailing Stones: Moving Rocks, Desert Tracks, and the Mystery Written Across Dry Lake Beds
View Strange Nature

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Legendary Places

Legendary places, sacred mountains, forbidden lakes, ruins, hidden temples, and named locations shaped by folklore, memory, and repeated versions.

Yomi: Japanese Underworld, Forbidden Glance, and the Place Return Cannot UndoMictlan: Aztec Underworld, Nine Levels, and the Long Road After DeathAsgard: Realm of the Aesir, Bifrost Bridge, and the Mythic Place Above the Human World
View Legendary Places

Mythic & Imagined Realms

Mythic Objects

Mythic objects, legendary swords, bells, mirrors, books, charms, relics, and symbolic items explained through folklore meaning and story function.

View Mythic Objects
